data.name: UserSuspended
data.value: Cannot enroll: User account is suspended.

data.name: CourseNotPublished
data.value: Cannot enroll: Course is not published.

data.name: SectionNotFound
data.value: Section not found or does not belong to this course.

data.name: SectionInactive
data.value: Cannot enroll: Section is not active.

data.name: AlreadyEnrolledSection
data.value: You are already enrolled in this course section.

data.name: AlreadyEnrolledCourse
data.value: You are already enrolled in this course (Section: {0}). You can only enroll in one section per course. Please unenroll from your current section first if you want to switch.

data.name: AlreadyEnrolledGeneric
data.value: You are already enrolled in this course. Please check your enrollments.

data.name: UnenrollOnlyOwn
data.value: You can only unenroll from your own enrollments.

data.name: UnenrollInvalidStatus
data.value: Cannot unenroll: Enrollment status is {0}. Only Active or Completed enrollments can be unenrolled.

data.name: InvalidProgressPercentage
data.value: Progress percentage must be between 0 and 100.

data.name: CompleteInvalidStatus
data.value: Cannot complete enrollment: Current status is {0}.

data.name: NoSectionsForEnrollment
data.value: Course has no sections available for enrollment.

data.name: PaymentRequired
data.value: This course requires payment. Please complete checkout before enrolling.
